Enum Class SVGElementCategory

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<SVGElementCategory>
org.tquadrat.foundation.svg.type.SVGElementCategory
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<SVGElementCategory>, Constable
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: SVGElementCategory.java 1151 2025-10-01 21:32:15Z tquadrat $") @API(status=STABLE, since="0.0.5") public enum SVGElementCategory extends Enum<SVGElementCategory>
The categories for the SVG elements.
Author:
Thomas Thrien (thomas.thrien@tquadrat.org)
Version:
$Id: SVGElementCategory.java 1151 2025-10-01 21:32:15Z tquadrat $
Since:
0.0.5

    • valueOf

      public static SVGElementCategory valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

      Returns the names of the elements that belong to this category.
      Returns:
      The element names.

    • retrieveElementCategory

      public static final Collection<SVGElementCategory> retrieveElementCategory(String elementName)
      Retrieves the element category for the given element name.
      Parameters:
      elementName - The name of the element.
      Returns:
      The categories for this element; will never be null.
